diffs.diff:
--- a/data_check.py
+++ b/data_check.py
@@ -0,0 +1,54 @@
+import torch

+import sys

+import os

+

+print('Loading train.pt...')

+data = torch.load('/data/train.pt', weights_only=True)

+nf = data['node_features']

+ei = data['edge_index']

+ea = data['edge_attr']

+N = min(10000, len(nf))

+print(f'Checking first {N} graphs')

+bad_graphs = []

+for i in range(N):

+    x = nf[i]

+    edge = ei[i]

+    if edge.shape[1] == 0:

+        # empty edge_index okay, will cause shape issues but not segfault

+        continue

+    if edge.max() >= x.size(0) or edge.min() < 0:

+        bad_graphs.append((i, 'edge_index out of bounds', edge.min().item(), edge.max().item(), x.size(0)))

+    # check NaN in features

+    if torch.isnan(x.float()).any():

+        bad_graphs.append((i, 'NaN in node_features'))

+    if torch.isnan(edge.float()).any():

+        bad_graphs.append((i, 'NaN in edge_index'))

+    if torch.isnan(ea[i].float()).any():

+        bad_graphs.append((i, 'NaN in edge_attr'))

+    if i % 1000 == 0:

+        print(f'Checked {i} graphs, bad so far: {len(bad_graphs)}', file=sys.stderr)

+print(f'Total bad graphs: {len(bad_graphs)}')

+for b in bad_graphs[:20]:

+    print(b)

+if len(bad_graphs) > 20:

+    print('...')

+# Also check labels

+labels = data['labels']

+print(f'Label shape: {len(labels)}')

+# check if any labels have all NaN

+all_nan = 0

+for i in range(N):

+    y = labels[i]

+    if (y == y).sum() == 0:

+        all_nan += 1

+print(f'Graphs with no labeled tasks (all NaN): {all_nan}')

+# check positive ratio

+pos_sum = 0

+labeled_sum = 0

+for i in range(N):

+    y = labels[i]

+    mask = y == y

+    pos_sum += y[mask].sum().item()

+    labeled_sum += mask.sum().item()

+print(f'Positive ratio in first {N}: {pos_sum/labeled_sum:.4f}' if labeled_sum else 'None')

+print('Done data check')
